title: Publish the Setup Skill to an official skill/plugin surface
description: Fresh adoption currently rides path 3: npm install to-execution, then telling the agent to read and follow node_modules/to-execution/SKILL.md. Make the skill official: publish to a plugin/skill surface (Claude Code plugin marketplace or equivalent) so installing the plugin registers the to-execution Setup Skill by name and 'set up execution' invokes it with no manual file pointing. EXEC-073/074 removed the external-dependency blockers (Preflight needs no global skills); EXEC-083 makes SKILL.md self-sufficient for any invocation path. Surface choice, packaging format, and versioning against the npm package decided at implementation — grill if the surface forces hard-to-reverse choices.
acceptance_criteria: Installing the published plugin/skill registers to-execution in the agent's skill list
Invoking the registered skill runs the same SKILL.md content the npm package ships (one source, no fork)
The npm path-3 flow keeps working unchanged for users who never install the plugin
CONTEXT.md's Setup Skill entry drops the 'tracked as EXEC-085' pointer once published
notes: Filed 2026-06-12 (Brooks): 'file an issue to make the skill official at some point.' Not sprint-targeted; actionable_now false until the plugin surface is chosen.
